subcodes.first_line: The Morn of Divine Unity hath dawned from the horizon of the soul, and the lights of the splendour of the Sinai of Divine Singleness have shone forth from the Dayspring of contingent being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: صبح صباح احدیت از مشرق جان طالع گشت و انوار سناء سینای صمدیت از مطلع امکان
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
